channel.title: Pages on The Beige Journal
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on The Beige Journal

item.title: 100 Digital Product Ideas that Make You Money While You Sleep!
item.description:
Are you tired of trading your time for dollars?

Imagine waking up to recurring income without lifting a finger. That’s the power of digital products. My FREE ebook, “100 Digital Product Ideas that Make You Money While You Sleep,” is your golden ticket to financial freedom.

I’ve poured my heart and soul into crafting a resource filled with opportunities. Whether you’re a seasoned entrepreneur or just starting, this book has something for everyone. It’s time to take control of your financial destiny.

Let’s build your online empire together!

Download my guide!

Loading…

(click on the “Loading…” link if it’s not loaded)

My Etsy Journey

https://youtu.be/SD1L25GfKB4

Learn more on my Channel!

Read the blog

item.title: The Success Blueprint
item.description:
What if I Told You Your Life Could Be Totally Different 90 Days from Now?

“The Success Blueprint” - 80+ Page Interactive Guide for Busy Women

Are You Ready to Transform Your Time and Life?

Imagine waking up 90 days from now with a completely transformed life. A life where you’re not just surviving the chaos but thriving in it. That’s exactly what “The Success Blueprint” is designed to do.

Tell Me if This Sounds Like You…

You’re a busy woman, maybe a mom, a professional, or both. You’ve set goals, tried establishing new habits, but somehow, life always seems to get in the way. The cycle of setting goals, starting strong, and then losing momentum is all too familiar.

item.description: Thank you for your purchase.

item.title: PLR Template Shop
item.description:
Get your freebie!

[sc name=“100digitalproducts” ][/sc]

Shop the templates

Why buy PLR templates?

  • 💰 COMMERCIAL USE OK! 👍

  • No selling limit

  • No credit needed

Except…

🚫 No selling of the UNEDITED Canva file 🚫

Get notified when new products are released!

Follow

What is PLR?

One of the best things about our PLR Canva templates is that they come with private label rights, meaning that you can use them as many times as you want and even sell them to others.

What is MRR?

It stands for Master Resell Rights. Basically, it’s like buying a cool digital product, like an ebook or course, at a special price and then being able to sell it as your own. It’s like having your own mini-store without all the hassle of creating the product yourself.

item.title: Sell PLR Planners
item.description:
Done-for-you digital products with PLR/Resell License!

Get the template - start selling now!

Loading…

Visit our PLR template shop!

FAQ:

What is a PLR planner?

PLR is an abbreviation for Private Label Rights, which implies you can buy the rights to a product and personalize it to make it your own. A PLR planner is a digital or printable planner template that you may purchase with PLR, allowing you to tweak and adapt the content, design, and branding to meet your or your clients’ needs.

PLR planner templates can range from daily, weekly, or monthly to specialized niche planners for themes like meal planning, fitness, or goal setting. They give a unique opportunity for businesses wishing to sell digital products online with minimal work and cost by providing a ready-made, customizable product.

item.title: 6 steps to Etsy success for selling digital downloads
item.description:
Hey there!

As an Etsy seller myself, I know firsthand how overwhelming it can be to start a new shop.

There are so many things to think about, from finding your niche to creating listings that convert, that it’s easy to get lost in the shuffle.

However, I’ve found that by following these six steps, I was able to set up my own shop and find success on Etsy.

These steps should be top priority for any new seller looking to make a name for themselves on the platform.

I hope that by sharing my experience, I can help you to find success on Etsy too!

Download my guide!

Loading…

(click on the “Loading…” link if it’s not loaded)

item.title: About
item.description:
The Beige Journal is a place to document, reflect and create. Here, you’ll find content about crafting, productivity, tech, business, lifestyle and motherhood.

Want to collaborate?

Send us a message!

Submit

item.title: Planner Lovin' Library- FAQ
item.description:
[sc name=“plannerlovinlibrary-menu” ][/sc]

Welcome to the library!

Here are all the sets for you to use with UNLIMITED access!

for $10/month you get…

✦ full access to the digital planner library! 〰  this is my personal collection of functional and decorative stickers, inserts, notebooks and other creative resources I’ve created over the years!

Want a preview of the types of sets available in the shop? Take a look at my Etsy shop

✦ formats: pre-cropped PNGs, transparent PNG files, PDF available. Perfect for printable and digital planning

✦ new kits added monthly

Use the password provided in your Patreon membership to access the library!

Sign up for the membership on Patreon!

Become a Patron!

FAQ

What is the Planner Lovin’ Library?

This digital library is made especially for digital planners!

item.title: A weekly digest for inspiration
item.description:
Sign up for The Beige Journal Newsletter and receive a weekly digest of productivity and creative inspiration and be notified of any new freebies!

You can unsubscribe anytime!

What you can expect from this newsletter:

  • Well curated inspiration for a productivity and organization
  • Discover new shops for a productive and creative lifestyle
  • Freebies 
  • Exclusive deals
  • Tutorial and tips

Access to the ever expanding freebie vault

A peek inside the freebie vault

Are you a planner shop? Click here to see how you can get featured!

item.title: TERMS OF SERVICE
item.description:
OVERVIEW

This website is operated by Planner Lovin’. Throughout the site, the terms “we”, “us” and “our” refer to Planner Lovin’. Planner Lovin’ offers this website, including all information, tools and services available from this site to you, the user, conditioned upon your acceptance of all terms, conditions, policies and notices stated here.

By visiting our site and/ or purchasing something from us, you engage in our “Service” and agree to be bound by the following terms and conditions (“Terms of Service”, “Terms”), including those additional terms and conditions and policies referenced herein and/or available by hyperlink. These Terms of Service apply to all users of the site, including without limitation users who are browsers, vendors, customers, merchants, and/ or contributors of content.

item.title: Get featured on our website!
item.description:
As a planner shop owner and member of the planner community, I can understand how much work it takes to run and shop and get the exposure you deserve for your products!

I know I love discovering news shops all the time and believe in supporting our small shops. This is why I would like to feature your shop and products for FREE on my blog and my newsletter dedicated for planner lovers.

Where I will feature your shop and products:

  • Monthly Newsletter to 800+ subscribers
  • Facebook Page/ Facebook Group
  • Instagram

Depending on time:

  • Blog
  • Youtube
  • Pinterest

I will do my best to tag/ notify you on all your featured locations so you can repost/etc… :)

If this is something that you’d like to participate in here’s what we need to gets started:
Everything Digital Lifestyle

item.title: Disclaimer
item.description: Keep in mind that we may receive commissions when you click our links and make purchases. However, this does not impact our reviews and comparisons. We try our best to keep things fair and balanced, in order to help you make the best choice for you.

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
Planner Lovin’ Privacy Policy

This Privacy Policy describes how your personal information is collected, used, and shared when you visit or make a purchase from plannerlovin.com (the “Site”).

PERSONAL INFORMATION WE COLLECT

When you visit the Site, we automatically collect certain information about your device, including information about your web browser, IP address, time zone, and some of the cookies that are installed on your device. Additionally, as you browse the Site, we collect information about the individual web pages or products that you view, what websites or search terms referred you to the Site, and information about how you interact with the Site. We refer to this automatically-collected information as “Device Information.”

We collect Device Information using the following technologies:
